Dedicated Xestro Support
Make Xestro work for the clinic, not against it

Purple Vector Operations provides practical, non-clinical Xestro support for clinics that need cleaner workflows, better templates, better billing logic, stronger reporting, and less daily friction.

Get Xestro Help Back to Home

What PVO helps with

The boring operational stuff that quietly decides whether the day runs smoothly.

Templates and forms

Set up or tidy templates, labels, letters, and repeat-use workflows so staff are not rebuilding the same thing all week.

Recalls and follow-up workflows

Review and rebuild recall logic, follow-up processes, and task routing so nothing important disappears into software fog.

Billing and reporting

Tune billing workflows, reporting outputs, and user access so the clinic can actually trust what it is looking at.

Common Xestro support tasks

  • Template and label pack setup
  • Recall clean-up and rebuilds
  • Billing workflow tune-ups
  • User access and permissions review
  • Staff support and practical training
  • Historical records access support
  • Workflow fixes after messy handovers or half-finished setups

How PVO approaches it

This is not about dumping jargon on staff or pretending software problems are “user error.” The goal is to understand how the clinic actually works, then make Xestro cleaner, faster, and easier to use in the real world.

PVO works alongside your existing staff and IT provider where needed. Support is strictly non-clinical and focused on operational use, setup, training, and workflow improvement.

Good fit for

Clinics that are tired of working around the software instead of through it.

  • New Xestro setups needing structure
  • Existing clinics with messy templates or recalls
  • Billing workflows that need simplification
  • Practices needing staff support and training
  • Clinics trying to access older records properly
  • Rooms inheriting a setup no one fully understands

Need Xestro help?

Tell me what is clunky, broken, confusing, or wasting staff time.

admin@purplevectoroperations.com

Based in Hobart, Tasmania • Remote support available Australia-wide
